# UC-13.4.17 · Grafana Plugin Backend Process Crash Loop Signatures

## Description

Unstable plugins take down query paths for critical datasources.

## Value

Isolates which plugin binary needs rollback or update.

## Implementation

Include `plugin_id` from structured logs; mask secrets in stack traces at ingest.

## SPL

```spl
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:log" logger=plugin.backend OR component=plugin
| search "panic" OR "SIGSEGV" OR "plugin process exited" OR "plugin crashed"
| stats count by plugin_id, datasource_uid
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (plugin_id), Single value (crash count).

## References

- [Grafana configuration — log](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/setup-grafana/configure-grafana/#log)
- [Grafana provisioning](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/administration/provisioning/)
